findings.description: Test-coverage regression on a RETAINED production decoder. The deleted hunk (@@ -1002,127 +886,6 @@) removed the `session_status_plain_ui_semantic_parity` case and its `emit_ui_session_status_ntf` helper, which were the ONLY test references to `ui_decode_session_status_ntf`. That function is NOT dead: it is defined at src/uci_ui_packet_decoder.c:2428 and dispatched at src/uci_packet_analyzer.c:586 and :638. Post-change, `grep ui_decode_session_status_ntf tests/` returns zero hits (it returned 1 in HEAD). Net effect: a live SESSION_STATUS_NTF decoder now has no regression coverage. The other two parity tests that were dropped (`core_device_info_plain_ui_semantic_parity`, `session_info_plain_ui_semantic_parity`) are acceptable because their UI counterparts are still exercised (test_uci_functions.c:2179 and :110), but session_status is not. Restore a minimal smoke/assert test for ui_decode_session_status_ntf.

Non-atomic changeset. The reviewed working tree conflates Phase 2.2 (dead-decoder removal) with unrelated deletions of include/uci_packet_structures.h, src/uci_packet_structures.c, and tests/test_packet_structures.c, plus edits to Makefile and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. The author labels these 'pre-existing dirty' and 'left untouched', but they are part of the same uncommitted diff a reviewer must evaluate, and the build only passes because the Makefile was also edited to drop those sources. Mixing two efforts prevents clean review/bisect and makes it impossible to attribute which Makefile changes belong to Phase 2.2. Split into separate commits before merge.

summary: The core deletion work is sound and well-executed: all 25 plain decoders, 16 ui_decode_* functions, and their declarations are genuinely dead (a per-symbol grep across src/ include/ tests/ found no remaining references or definitions for any removed name), the retained symbols (decode_range_vendor_data, print_short/extended_address_measurement) are correctly preserved with declarations in uci_plain_decoders_internal.h and live callers in src/uci.c, the tree rebuilds clean under -Wall -Wextra with zero compiler warnings (no orphaned statics), and all 56 unit tests pass. Two issues block approval: (1) MEDIUM - removing the parity tests stripped the only coverage of ui_decode_session_status_ntf, which remains a live production decoder dispatched from uci_packet_analyzer.c; (2) LOW - the changeset is non-atomic, bundling unrelated packet-structures/Makefile/docs changes the author disclaims but which are inseparable in this diff. Add a replacement test for ui_decode_session_status_ntf and isolate the unrelated changes.
